title: Advanced Calculus (2AC)

prerequisites.text: MAM1031F and MAM1032S or equivalent. With convener permission, students with 70% for both MAM1010F and MAM1012S may register.

outline: Students study the fundamentals of multivariable calculus, including: curves and surfaces in three dimensions; change of coordinates; line integrals; surface integrals; and Stokes's, Green's and divergence theorems.
lecture_times: Tuesdays, Fridays and some Wednesdays in 5th period. Note: Lectures alternate during the week so students can take MAM2010F and MAM2011F concurrently.
